This 'external/' folder is the directory mapped inside the Docker container to store input datasets and receive output models.

========================================================================
📋 DATASET PREPARATION STEP
========================================================================
Please place your 'lmd_2023_dataset.csv' file directly inside this directory:
   c:\workspaceag\slm-tr\external\lmd_2023_dataset.csv

Once you start the Docker container, the training run will ingest this file.

========================================================================
📂 MODEL TRAINING OUTPUTS
========================================================================
Once a training cycle completes, the container will automatically create a 
'trainedoutput/' subfolder here and populate it with the trained weights:
   - deberta-lateral-movement/ (Classifier model)
   - qwen-lateral-movement/ (Generative LoRA adapters)
